⚠️ Disclaimer

📌 This tool is a mathematical calculator only, computing loan payments and repayment schedules
🚫 Interest-based loans are prohibited in Islamic law. Consider Islamic financing alternatives (Murabaha, Ijara, Musharaka)
📋 This website does not encourage interest-based borrowing and bears no responsibility for the use of this tool
📊 Results are approximate and may differ from actual figures at banks and financial institutions
